selection_contract.no_wait_only_state: If no external packet exists, actively generate or kill a source-native candidate or strengthen its completion attack. Do not repeat closed synthetic controls.
selection_contract.minimum_material_output: A typed physical candidate, native source-law derivation attempt, whole-family completion attack, proof or counterexample, executable discriminator, or observable-separation result. A wait note, packet wrapper, or narrative alone is insufficient.

artifact_role: Repository-owned work and ranking portfolio. Durable Lane definitions and control state exist only in root LANES.yaml.

work_groups.purpose: Construct or kill a positive physical source-side issuance witness by generating candidates, attacking every admitted whole-family completion, and requiring an observable distinction from fixed-family dynamics.
work_groups.current_authority: CompletionClass v1 and the E177 three-world discriminator are bounded instruments. They do not establish physical issuance. The anti-collapse throughput, effective-gauge/topological-sector, monitored-dynamics, gravitational observer-algebra, CRISPR sequence-acquisition, dynamic/Floquet scheduled-code, prion-like conformational-templating, autocatalytic reaction-network, Schwinger/vacuum pair-production, Bose-Einstein-condensation/macroscopic phase-coherence, r-process nucleosynthesis/heavy-element abundance-flow, turbulent-cascade/inertial-range-structure, and crack-branching/fracture-interface candidates failed closed. RUN-0177 closed the whole-family completion tournament as scoped class-level absorption across the twelve material physical-campaign classes. Physical witness generation may resume only for a structurally new candidate with source-owned law, internal anti-after-naming, W4 nonfactorization, native carrier or algebra growth, matched resources, and observable difference from the strongest fixed rival.

latest_material_swing.next_handoff: Resume physical witness generation only for a structurally new non-overlapping candidate with source-owned transition law, internal anti-after-naming, W4 perturbation nonfactorization, native carrier or algebra growth, matched intervention/resource budget, and observable difference from the strongest fixed rival.

work_groups.kill_condition: If every physically legitimate candidate is reproducible by an admitted fixed-source, whole-family, history, boundary, stochastic, resource, access, relabeling, or gauge completion, preserve the scoped absorption and narrow TI rather than moving the completion goalposts.
work_groups.forbidden_shortcut: Do not promote unpredictability, randomness, chaos, computation cost, irreversibility, observer ignorance, quantum indeterminacy, or a changing description into source issuance.

internal_work_items.next_swing: Select one physically serious non-overlapping candidate only if it supplies source-owned transition law, internal anti-after-naming, W4 perturbation nonfactorization, native carrier or algebra growth, matched intervention/resource budget, and observable difference from the strongest fixed rival. Do not repeat anti-collapse throughput, emergent effective-gauge/topological-sector, monitored-dynamics phase-transition, gravitational observer-algebra bookkeeping, CRISPR/adaptive immune sequence-space occupancy, dynamic/Floquet scheduled-code logical-sector, prion-like conformational-templating, autocatalytic reaction-network, Schwinger/vacuum pair-production, Bose-Einstein-condensation/macroscopic phase-coherence, r-process/nucleosynthesis/heavy-element abundance-flow, turbulent-cascade/inertial-range-structure, or crack-branching/fracture-interface claims unless their missing source-law objects appear.
internal_work_items.success_condition: A typed candidate supplies a native transition and source law, matched physical context, boundary response, W4 nonfactorization, and a residual not already encoded in the preregistered fixed family.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: The candidate is only observer-side projection, access change, record readout, fixed-family selection, effective low-energy/gauge description, or a restatement of a previously absorbed class.

internal_work_items.activation: Reopen only if a new material physical-campaign class changes the tested family boundary or supplies a verifier-backed nonfactorization counterexample to the composed panel.
internal_work_items.next_swing: Close declared composition rules for CompletionClass v1 and apply the strongest composed completion panel to the twelve failed physical candidate classes, or to a construction-neutral representative of those failures. Explicitly test boundary-source hypotheses against hidden-state, initial-condition, boundary-condition, fixed-source, stochastic-seed, observer-information/access, resource/capability, whole-family, completed-history, provenance/name, relabeling, and gauge completions. Return either a scoped class-level absorption result or the minimal source-law, anti-after-naming, W4 nonfactorization, carrier, intervention/resource, and observable-difference criteria a survivor must meet. Add an omission mutant only when it represents a genuinely new legitimate completion, not to protect the hypothesis.
internal_work_items.success_condition: The candidate either receives a verifier-backed bounded nonfactorization certificate under declared compositions or is absorbed with the exact completion named.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: A legitimate completion reproduces the full candidate packet or composition closure makes the claimed residual disappear.
internal_work_items.latest_result: RUN-0177 returned SCOPED_CLASS_LEVEL_ABSORPTION across the twelve material physical-campaign classes and restored TI-PHYSICAL-WITNESS-GENERATION as READY under the post-tournament gate.

internal_work_items.activation: One physical candidate survives the bounded completion tournament with a source-owned transition object.
internal_work_items.next_swing: Derive an observable statistic or retarded response that differs between the candidate issuance model and its strongest admitted fixed-family rival. Freeze the discriminator and kill thresholds before inspecting holdout data.
internal_work_items.success_condition: The two models imply distinguishable observables under a shared intervention and resource budget.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: Every observable distribution is reproduced by the admitted fixed-family rival or differs only by fitted hidden state.

internal_work_items.activation: A provenance-valid p2c witness packet fixes one construction, source law, transition, boundary, physical context, and rival family without asserting issuance.
internal_work_items.next_swing: Run H7, CompletionClass v1 with declared compositions, and the best surviving source-versus-projection discriminator. Return a sovereign TI result without importing TaF capability or GU native-versus-forced judgments.
internal_work_items.success_condition: The frozen candidate survives the declared completion class and supplies the physical source-side objects TI requires.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: The candidate fails admission, factors through an admitted completion, or supplies only record, access, capability, or finality evidence.

handoffs.from_gu_formalization: RUN-0184 reconciled system/mailboxes/temporal-issuance/20260720-coflip-holonomy-grade-notice.md as a grade update to the prior conditional Krein/orientation handoff. GU reports a matrix-verified Z/2 holonomy habitat on its Cl(9,5) representation, improving the geometric evidence floor beyond the earlier toy-grade note. It still does not admit a Temporal Issuance physical candidate: no source-owned transition law, internal anti-after-naming rule, W4 nonfactorization, native carrier or algebra growth, matched intervention/resource budget, or physical observable separation was supplied.
handoffs.gfe_black_hole_leakage_raw_material: RUN-0188 recorded the GfE black-hole leakage notice as a distinct, physically serious candidate-13 lead but declined admission under the active all-six-criteria contract. The cited GU intake supports an explicit modified-vacuum field law, a constant large-mass leakage rate, an intermediate Hawking-like M-dot scaling, and r^-4 corrections. Missing: an internal anti-after-naming rule, W4 perturbation nonfactorization, native carrier or algebra growth beyond fixed-law emitted content, a matched intervention/resource budget, and a frozen observable difference against the strongest fixed rival. Recheck only from a provenance-valid packet that closes those fields.
handoffs.four_repo_persona_synthesis: RUN-0189 absorbed the four-repo persona synthesis as non-activating corroboration of the existing six-criteria gate. Its additive discipline is to report source formation, receiver capability, and record/finality consequences separately. It supplies no candidate or gate-closing evidence, so candidate 13 remains unadmitted and Lane 1 is unchanged.
handoffs.from_possibility_to_capability: A mailbox proposal is only an activation candidate until packet provenance and source-law fields validate.
handoffs.to_possibility_to_capability: Return a frozen issuance-versus-completion adjudication without asserting capability change or joint success.
handoffs.to_time_as_finality: A source-side survivor may be offered as a case, but it does not supply TaF's capability verdict.
handoffs.return_activation: A material frozen return, new physical source law, or completion-class counterexample triggers stewardship reranking.

work_groups.purpose: Formal local issuance, Lean fixtures, and conditional theorems that directly support the physical witness campaign.
work_groups.activation: Select only when it closes a named active-lane blocker or no active physical candidate work is executable.
work_groups.forbidden_shortcut: Do not let another clean formal/local witness replace the unresolved physical source question.
